summary: DTU citation system is implemented and functional. Uses lexical search (token + n-gram); embedding-based semantic search exists but is not used in the chat retrieval path.

retrieval.algorithm: Lexical: token Jaccard (0.55) + expanded token Jaccard (0.30) + n-gram similarity (0.15) + temporal recency (0.10)

embedding_search.note: Embeddings are generated and stored but cosineSimilarity is not called in the chat.respond macro DTU retrieval path. Only lexical search is used.

gaps.description: Embedding-based semantic search exists (server/embeddings.js) with SQLite cache, but chat DTU retrieval uses only lexical token/n-gram matching. Semantically similar queries with different vocabulary miss relevant DTUs.
gaps.suggested_fix: In chat DTU scoring (server/server.js:18347-18350), add embedding similarity score term: embed the query, compute cosine similarity against cached DTU embeddings, blend at 0.20 weight.
